website.name: Abroado
website.description: Your trusted study abroad and visitor visa consultancy for UK and Australia. Expert guidance for international education and travel.
website.main_purpose: Helps users apply for Study Visas and Visitor Visas to the UK and Australia, providing end-to-end guidance from university selection to visa approval.

faqs.question: What services does Abroado offer?
faqs.answer: Abroado offers end-to-end consultancy for Study Visas and Visitor Visas to the UK and Australia. This includes university shortlisting, application/SOP writing, documentation support, IELTS/PTE preparation, and pre-departure briefings.

faqs.question: Which countries does Abroado specialize in?
faqs.answer: We specialize in educational and travel visas for the United Kingdom (UK) and Australia.

faqs.question: What is Abroado's visa approval success rate?
faqs.answer: We maintain a 98% visa approval success rate, achieved through rigorous documentation vetting and expert case guidance.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply for a student visa?
faqs.answer: Typically, you need a valid passport, academic transcripts, proof of English language proficiency (IELTS/PTE), a Statement of Purpose (SOP), letters of recommendation, and proof of sufficient funds.

faqs.question: Do you provide training for English proficiency tests?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive training and preparation support for IELTS and PTE to ensure you achieve the scores required by your target institutions.

faqs.question: How can I book a free consultation with your team?
faqs.answer: You can request a free consultation by filling out the contact form on our website or calling us directly at +91 123 456 7890.

services.name: Study Visa
services.description: Pursue world-class education in the UK and Australia. We guide you from university selection to visa approval.

services.name: Visitor Visa
services.description: Explore the UK and Australia for tourism, business, or visiting family. Quick processing with high approval rates.

services.name: IELTS Preparation
services.description: Comprehensive preparation support and training to achieve required scores for university admissions.

contact.address: 123 Education Lane, Business Hub, New Delhi, India 110001

policies.refund: Refunds on booking deposits or consultancy fees are processed within 7 business days under eligible cancellation conditions.
policies.privacy: User data is highly protected and not shared with third parties, in compliance with standard data privacy regulations.
